creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
cd /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gtk20
make clean
make package

currently fails as follows:

Fix: See attached patch.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gtk20
make clean
make package
